Plan.path: Plan > Target Audience Analysis > Segmentation > Psychographic segmentation > Self-concept and identity vulnerability > Self-worth contingencies (Crocker) > Virtue-based self-worth

Prepare.path: Prepare > Microtarget > Effect-chain coupling lattice > Trigger event class > Public health announcement trigger through microtargeting
Prepare.technique: Public health announcement trigger through microtargeting

Execute.path: Execute > Conduct Pump Priming > Full-spectrum effect configuration space > Output effect plane > Decisional effects > Choice set distortion pump priming

exposure_network_assignment.edge_meaning: The source position is a visible peer whose output was plausibly exposed to the target position; derived from source user liking, reposting, or quoting target user content in the raw data.
